Hi! Sloth here just hanging out, ready to take it slow with you.
Check out this weeks tip from the Lazy Academy! In this weeks
video, learn how to rollback changes/revert back with the Recover
button ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..lHyhjwJN5TrXQu2Rlg_hGhNUSqri8lohNRoZajy-28w ) when building your app in
Lazy AI.

If you haven't started using Lazy yet, now is a good time to
log-in and start!

Start building full-stack apps
with prompts! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..y4P3p-IthVQ0ziyYzoZeozMUz0B6D-ifzD8vqCO7AMg )

( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bHOrHOetHjK3TXxJJSSL4y6mlDmQA4nGkMjRUe-eUSA ) to learn, get help, and see
examples of how people around the world are using Lazy!
